title: Soft Touch Newborn Essentials 70 x 90cm Cotton Baby Cellular Blanket for Pram, Car Seat and Cot Bedding
features: Baby Blanket for Newborn: Our cellular blanket is made from 100% cotton with a breathable waffle weave design. Hypoallergenic, super soft fabric. Cosy, comfortable, warm blanket for newborns. Lightweight summer blanket and winter layering essential
Perfect Size: Generous 70x90cm dimensions suitable from newborn to toddler. Perfect for swaddling. Universal size for a cot blanket, pram blanket, and travel blanket. Fits Moses baskets and car seats

Cotton Baby Blanket: Extra gentle cotton fabric kind to delicate newborn skin. Super soft touch blanket that babies love. Premium quality cotton cellular blanket for superior comfort. Hypoallergenic, cosy, plush texture. Soft blanket baby essentials
Easy Travel Companion: Lightweight and folds compactly in a changing bag. Perfect for on-the-go parents. Essential car seat accessory. Takes minimal space while providing maximum comfort for baby

Ideal New Baby Gifts: Essential baby presents. Our cellular blankets are suitable for baby boys and baby girls. Practical newborn essentials list item. Sensory blanket, tag blanket, comfort blanket. A baby shower favourite
description: Product Description MAXIMUM COMFORT Made with premium cotton yarn Cellular construction provides breathability and warmth Perfect dimensions for cot, pram, moses basket and bed TWIN PACK VALUE 2 pieces included within your purchase Cheaper than buying individually Use one, Wash the other BACKED BY OEKO-TEX 100% Super Soft Cotton OEKO-TEX Standard 100 Class 1 Certified for baby use SAFE - Tested and Certified NO HARMFUL DYES AND CHEMICALS SOFT TOUCH QUALITY Over 35 years experience supplying quality baby products to the UK and European market Trusted British Brand Quality comes first Material Composition 100% Super Soft Cotton Certification OEKO-TEX Standard 100 Class 1 Dimensions 70cm x 90cm (Pram Size) Weave Cellular construction for breathability and comfort Ultimate Value Twin-pack includes 2 x Soft Touch Cellular Blankets with matching satin gift bow Care instructions Machine Washable at 30 Degrees Celcius.
